title: eleocharis nodulosa
intro: Eleocharis nodulosa, also known as Button Sedge, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). Traditionally, Button Sedge has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an expectorant. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as relieving respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, and aiding in the treatment of digestive problems. Button Sedge can be prepared into herbal preparations, including teas and infusions, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
